activity.name: Rule: Game Ends If All Living Players Reach Their Exits-unknown
Rule: Game Ends If All Living Players Reach Their Exits-complete

template.description: response and precedence: 1. After every Visualize Player Stats-complete there has to be at least one Get Player Initiative-start. and 2. Get Player Initiative-start has to be preceded by Visualize Player Stats-complete. Get Player Initiative-start can happen only after Visualize Player Stats-complete had happened.
template.name: succession

template.description: response and precedence: 1. After every Visualize Player Stats-unknown there has to be at least one Visualize Player Stats-complete. and 2. Visualize Player Stats-complete has to be preceded by Visualize Player Stats-unknown. Visualize Player Stats-complete can happen only after Visualize Player Stats-unknown had happened.
template.name: succession

template.description: response and precedence: 1. After every Place Initial Terrain-unknown there has to be at least one Place Initial Terrain-complete. and 2. Place Initial Terrain-complete has to be preceded by Place Initial Terrain-unknown. Place Initial Terrain-complete can happen only after Place Initial Terrain-unknown had happened.
template.name: succession

template.description: response and precedence: 1. After every Player Turn-start there has to be at least one Player Turn-unknown. and 2. Player Turn-unknown has to be preceded by Player Turn-start. Player Turn-unknown can happen only after Player Turn-start had happened.
template.name: succession

template.description: response and precedence: 1. After every End Player Selection-complete there has to be at least one Visualize Player Stats-start. and 2. Visualize Player Stats-start has to be preceded by End Player Selection-complete. Visualize Player Stats-start can happen only after End Player Selection-complete had happened.
template.name: succession

template.description: response and precedence: 1. After every Rule: Game Ends If All Living Players Reach Their Exits-unknown there has to be at least one Rule: Game Ends If All Living Players Reach Their Exits-complete. and 2. Rule: Game Ends If All Living Players Reach Their Exits-complete has to be preceded by Rule: Game Ends If All Living Players Reach Their Exits-unknown. Rule: Game Ends If All Living Players Reach Their Exits-complete can happen only after Rule: Game Ends If All Living Players Reach Their Exits-unknown had happened.
template.name: succession

branch.name: Rule: Game Ends If All Living Players Reach Their Exits-unknown
Rule: Game Ends If All Living Players Reach Their Exits-complete

template.description: response and precedence: 1. After every Get Player Initiative-start there has to be at least one Get Player Initiative-unknown. and 2. Get Player Initiative-unknown has to be preceded by Get Player Initiative-start. Get Player Initiative-unknown can happen only after Get Player Initiative-start had happened.

End Player Selection-complete has to be preceded by End Player Selection-unknown. End Player Selection-complete can happen only after End Player Selection-unknown had happened.

template.description: response and precedence: 1. After every Assign Position on Grid-unknown there has to be at least one Assign Position on Grid-complete. and 2. Assign Position on Grid-complete has to be preceded by Assign Position on Grid-unknown. Assign Position on Grid-complete can happen only after Assign Position on Grid-unknown had happened.
template.name: succession

template.description: response and precedence: 1. After every Advance to Next Player-complete there has to be at least one End Player Selection-unknown. and 2. End Player Selection-unknown has to be preceded by Advance to Next Player-complete. End Player Selection-unknown can happen only after Advance to Next Player-complete had happened.
template.name: succession

template.description: response and precedence: 1. After every Enemy Turn-unknown there has to be at least one Enemy Turn-complete. and 2. Enemy Turn-complete has to be preceded by Enemy Turn-unknown. Enemy Turn-complete can happen only after Enemy Turn-unknown had happened.
template.name: succession

template.description: response and precedence: 1. After every Move Robot to Start Position-complete there has to be at least one Place Initial Terrain-start. and 2. Place Initial Terrain-start has to be preceded by Move Robot to Start Position-complete. Place Initial Terrain-start can happen only after Move Robot to Start Position-complete had happened.
